'''鈭歾-ch-p-p''' ('''kazachpepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulnerate|vulnerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulnerate|vulnerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-ch-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazachpepoko
|}
